reports.name: Nvidia
reports.report_md:
# GICS Research Stub — NVDA

> Auto-generated from GICS classification metadata. Full batch report not yet available from GICS_industry DB.

- **Company:** Nvidia
- **GICS code:** 45301020
- **Classification:** Information Technology → Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment → Semiconductors → Semiconductors
- **Sector workflow:** Semiconductor Process Expert

## Suggested verification queries
- NVDA SEC 10-K risk factors capacity customers
- NVDA Nvidia supply chain bottleneck evidence
- NVDA Bitget stock token tradability

## Next step
Run GICS_industry batch_manager against this ticker to replace this stub with a full markdown report.

workflow_plans.name: Nvidia
workflow_plans.system_prompt: Audit process nodes, advanced packaging, foundry utilization, and developer ecosystem moats.
search_queries: NVDA SEC 10-K risk factors capacity customers
NVDA Nvidia supply chain bottleneck evidence

NVDA.system_prompt_template: Synthesize financial, compliance, and sector expert inputs into an investor-grade GICS-aligned thesis.
Analyze profitability quality, valuation multiples, and capital efficiency from filings and market data.
Stress-test macro, regulatory, and substitution risks against the current bottleneck thesis.
Audit process nodes, advanced packaging, foundry utilization, and developer ecosystem moats.

warnings: GICS_API_URL not set — using static SP500 catalog + local workflow templates.

bitget_discovery.summary_en: 16 Bitget-listed discovery name(s): 12 via GICS prefix 453010, 12 via sector hints.
bitget_discovery.summary_zh: 共 16 个 Bitget 发现标的：12 个来自 GICS 前缀 453010，12 个来自行业关键词。

final_result_card.reason: Controls scarce GPU allocation and the CUDA software stack for AI workloads

primary_bottleneck.name: NVIDIA
primary_bottleneck.reason: Controls scarce GPU allocation and the CUDA software stack for AI workloads
primary_bottleneck.event_reason_en: 1 extracted event(s) contribute -3; macro overlay contributes +0. Structural score remains visible as the base.
primary_bottleneck.event_reason_zh: 1 个已提取事件贡献 -3；宏观叠加贡献 +0。结构性评分仍作为基础分保留。

decision_summary.one_line_conclusion: In AI Chips, the real control point is NVDA (NVIDIA) because controls scarce gpu allocation and the cuda software stack for ai workloads.

end_to_end_stages.label_zh: 行业输入 → 意图解析
end_to_end_stages.detail_en: User query normalized with aliases and constrained intent analysis.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 用户查询经别名归一化与约束式意图解析。

end_to_end_stages.detail_en: Layers, bottleneck, hard constraints, and audit trail generated.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 已生成层级、瓶颈、硬约束与审计链。

end_to_end_stages.label_zh: Agent Hub 新闻 + 宏观

end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: 公开 symbols/tickers 已挂载到候选。
当前篮子无法完成回测。

end_to_end_stages.detail_en: UI download includes candles, trades, research, thesis audit, and self-assessment.
end_to_end_stages.detail_zh: UI 下载包含 K 线、交易、调研、论证复核与自评。

achieved_en: Supply-chain bottleneck thesis with alternative hypothesis and thesis audit.
Universe coverage banner shows full/partial/out-of-scope honestly.
Primary-source SEC/IR links in thesis audit.
GICS industry alignment check + Bitget peer discovery via GICS prefix.
achieved_zh: 供应链瓶颈 thesis，含替代假设与论证复核。
覆盖度横幅诚实展示 full/partial/out-of-scope。
论证复核含 SEC/IR 一手证据入口。
GICS 行业对齐校验 + 按 GICS 前缀发现 Bitget 同业。
gaps_en: Fixed curated research universe (~253 companies); niche queries may be proxy-only.
LLM runs in rules/curated grounding mode without live web search.
No automated filing parse — human review still required.
gaps_zh: 固定策展研究库（约 253 家）；冷门行业可能仅为代理映射。
无 API Key 时为规则/精选 grounding 模式。
尚未自动解析公告——仍需人工阅读。

achieved_en: Public demo: https://throatscan-oracle.vercel.app
Bitget public API + backtest + downloadable evidence with SHA-256.
Local paper basket execution at live Bitget prices.
One-click AI chips demo and /api/health verification.
achieved_zh: 公网 Demo：https://throatscan-oracle.vercel.app
Bitget 公开 API + 回测 + 可下载 SHA-256 证据包。
本地纸交易篮子（Bitget 公开价成交）。
一键 AI chips 与 /api/health 验证。
gaps_en: Demo video URL not yet attached in submission pack.
Live trading intentionally locked; Bitget Demo API optional (server env).
gaps_zh: 提交包中尚未附 demo 视频链接。
实盘交易刻意锁定；Bitget Demo API 为可选（服务端 env）。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: Backtest + local paper (Tier 2); not live trading
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: 回测 + 本地纸交易（Tier 2）；非实盘

achieved_en: End-to-end: input → reasoning → research → Bitget → events → sim → backtest → export.
Low-confidence paths withhold Top 5; missing data not fabricated.
Tradability guide separates research-only vs executable names.
achieved_zh: 端到端：输入 → 推理 → 调研 → Bitget → 事件 → 模拟 → 回测 → 导出。
低置信度不强制 Top 5；缺失数据不伪造。
可交易性指南区分研究结论与可执行标的。
gaps_en: Submission form, dev diary, and demo video still manual deliverables.
Current run has research-only names without direct Bitget basket.
gaps_zh: 提交表单、开发日记、demo 视频仍为人工交付项。
本次运行仅有研究结论，无直接 Bitget 篮子。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: MVP complete with honest boundary disclosure
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: MVP 完整，边界披露诚实

achieved_en: ThroatScan is not a single LLM prompt or theme screener. It orchestrates parallel Agent Hub news/macro research, constrained supply-chain reasoning, Bitget tradability verification, and risk-managed simulation — with hard gates the LLM cannot bypass.
In-app Agent Workflow timeline (8 steps) with MCP tools_used and fetch timestamps.
Hard constraints enforced: ticker_allowlist, llm_no_pick, bitget_gate, confidence_cap.
Growth roadmap Phase 1 live; Phase 2 planned.
Rebalance agent plan ready — 0 rebalance events in backtest.
0 Bitget online stock tokens discoverable beyond 253-company research library.
Public repo: https://github.com/vvlnx/agent-hub
achieved_zh: ThroatScan 不是单次 LLM 问答或主题筛选器。它并行编排 Agent Hub 新闻/宏观调研、约束式供应链推理、Bitget 可交易性验证与风控模拟——LLM 无法绕过硬约束门槛。
应用内 Agent 工作流时间线（8 步），含 MCP tools_used 与抓取时间。
硬约束已执行：ticker_allowlist、llm_no_pick、bitget_gate、confidence_cap。
成长路线 Phase 1 已上线；Phase 2 规划中。
再平衡 Agent 计划就绪——回测中 0 次再平衡事件。
0 个 Bitget 在线 stock token 可发现，超越 253 家公司研究库。
公开仓库：https://github.com/vvlnx/agent-hub
gaps_en: Autonomous live trading intentionally disabled for hackathon safety.
Phase 3 earnings-season event agent remains on roadmap (scheduled Q3 extension).
gaps_zh: 自主实盘交易因黑客松安全考虑刻意未启用。
Phase 3 财报季事件 Agent 仍在路线图中（计划 Q3 扩展）。
judge_self_assessment.rating_en: Agent-native research-to-execution — not a single LLM prompt
judge_self_assessment.rating_zh: Agent 原生 research-to-execution — 非单次 LLM 问答

tradability_guide.execution_tier_summary_en: Tier A: 0, Tier B: 3, catalog tickers: 569.

funding.transfer: Main account → US Stocks securities account

steps_en: Deposit or buy USDC in your Bitget main account.
Transfer USDC to your Bitget US Stocks securities account.
Search NVDA in the Bitget App US Stocks section.
Place a market or limit order in USD during supported trading hours.
steps_zh: 在 Bitget 主账户充值或购买 USDC。
将 USDC 划转至 Bitget 美股证券账户。
在 Bitget App 美股专区搜索 NVDA。
在支持的交易时段内以 USD 下市价或限价单。
app_handoff_plans.disclaimer_en: Bitget US Stocks direct trading has no public API yet. This handoff is guidance only; verify eligibility and hours in the Bitget App.
app_handoff_plans.disclaimer_zh: Bitget 美股直连尚无公开 API。以下仅为操作指引；请在 Bitget App 内确认资格与交易时段。

tradability_guide.summary_en: Tier B App handoff is available for NVDA (Bitget US Stocks direct; no public API yet).
tradability_guide.summary_zh: Tier B App 交接可用：NVDA（Bitget 美股直连，尚无公开 API）。
tradability_guide.recommended_action_en: Deposit or buy USDC in your Bitget main account. Transfer USDC to your Bitget US Stocks securities account. Search NVDA in the Bitget App US Stocks section. Place a market or limit order in USD during supported trading hours.
tradability_guide.recommended_action_zh: 在 Bitget 主账户充值或购买 USDC。 将 USDC 划转至 Bitget 美股证券账户。 在 Bitget App 美股专区搜索 NVDA。 在支持的交易时段内以 USD 下市价或限价单。

novelty.why_agent_only_en: ThroatScan is not a single LLM prompt or theme screener. It orchestrates parallel Agent Hub news/macro research, constrained supply-chain reasoning, Bitget tradability verification, and risk-managed simulation — with hard gates the LLM cannot bypass.
novelty.why_agent_only_zh: ThroatScan 不是单次 LLM 问答或主题筛选器。它并行编排 Agent Hub 新闻/宏观调研、约束式供应链推理、Bitget 可交易性验证与风控模拟——LLM 无法绕过硬约束门槛。
vs_traditional_screener_en: Parallel live MCP research while reasoning runs (not sequential chat).
Structural bottleneck thesis with rejected alternatives — not popularity ranking.
Tradability and evidence export wired to Bitget public API endpoints.
vs_traditional_screener_zh: 推理运行时并行拉取 live MCP 调研（非顺序聊天）。
结构性瓶颈 thesis 含被排除替代方案——非热度排序。
可交易性与证据导出直连 Bitget 公开 API。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Layers, bottleneck, alternatives, and audit trail without LLM ticker selection.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 层级、瓶颈、替代假设与审计链——不由 LLM 选 ticker。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Prefix 45301020, 15 catalog peers, 1 report(s). Runs parallel to Agent Hub MCP.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 前缀 45301020，15 个目录同业，1 份报告。与 Agent Hub MCP 并行运行。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Symbols attached; backtest pending or unavailable.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 已挂载 symbols；回测待定或不可用。

agent_workflow.agent_zh: 模拟决策 + 证据导出

hard_constraints.label_zh: 固定公司库 + 角色门槛
hard_constraints.enforced_en: Only seeded companies passing role/sector/query alignment enter the candidate pool.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: 仅通过角色/行业/查询对齐的种子公司可进入候选池。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: LLM augments industry grounding only; deterministic engine selects companies.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: LLM 仅辅助行业 grounding；公司选择由确定性引擎完成。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: Tier A basket = spot API executable; Tier B = App handoff only; no fake API orders.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: Tier A 篮子 = spot API 可执行；Tier B = 仅 App 交接；禁止伪造 API 下单。

hard_constraints.enforced_en: News/macro/event confidence overlay capped at ±12 points on structural score.
hard_constraints.enforced_zh: 新闻/宏观/事件置信叠加在结构分上封顶 ±12 分。

items_en: Multi-agent workflow with Agent Hub MCP + constrained engine.
Bitget candle backtest, local paper basket, downloadable evidence.
items_zh: Agent Hub MCP + 约束引擎的多 Agent 工作流。
Bitget K 线回测、本地纸交易篮子、可下载证据包。
50+ 个 Bitget 在线 stock token 可发现。

growth_roadmap.title_zh: 纸交易 + 再平衡 Agent
items_en: Bitget Demo API ready via BITGET_DEMO_* env (optional upgrade).
Local paper basket execution at live Bitget public prices (enabled).
Rebalance agent plan: periodic rebalance + 15% trailing stop triggers.
items_zh: Bitget Demo API 可通过 BITGET_DEMO_* 环境变量启用。
本地纸交易篮子（Bitget 公开价成交）已启用。
再平衡 Agent 计划：周期性再平衡 + 15% 移动止损触发。

growth_roadmap.title_zh: 事件 Agent + 全市场 universe
items_en: Earnings/capacity event agent during reporting season.
Dynamic Bitget symbol discovery beyond fixed research library.
Scheduled autonomous rebalance with human approval gate.
items_zh: 财报季 earnings/产能事件 Agent。
超越固定研究库的 Bitget 动态 symbol 发现。
带人工审批门的定时自主再平衡。

rebalance_agent.policy_en: Rebalance every 20 shared observations; 15% trailing stop; 40% max position.
rebalance_agent.policy_zh: 每 20 个共同观测日再平衡；15% 移动止损；单仓上限 40%。
triggers_en: Periodic rebalance to max-risk target weights
Paper basket fill after sim decision
triggers_zh: 周期性再平衡至最大风险目标权重
模拟决策后执行纸交易篮子
rebalance_agent.next_action_en: Await sim decision with tradable Bitget symbols.
rebalance_agent.next_action_zh: 等待含 Bitget 可交易标的的模拟决策。

completeness.honest_summary_en: ThroatScan completed 6/7 end-to-end stages. Tier B App handoff is available for NVDA (Bitget US Stocks direct; no public API yet). This is research software with verifiable Bitget evidence — not financial advice.
completeness.honest_summary_zh: ThroatScan 完成 6/7 个端到端阶段。Tier B App 交接可用：NVDA（Bitget 美股直连，尚无公开 API）。 这是带可验证 Bitget 证据的研究软件——不构成投资建议。

thesis_audit.summary_en: The thesis audit ranks Midstream conversion layer first and supports current bottleneck thesis with evidence grade MEDIUM.
thesis_audit.summary_zh: 论证复核优先关注中游转化/平台层，结论为「支持当前瓶颈判断」，证据等级为中。
thesis_audit.project_role_en: This layer turns an open-source scarce-layer research workflow into an audit layer for ThroatScan: rank scarce layers first, challenge the thesis, then separate research-only names from Bitget-executable names.
thesis_audit.project_role_zh: 这一层把开源稀缺层研究流程转成 ThroatScan 的审计层：先排稀缺层，再挑战结论，最后把研究标的和 Bitget 可执行标的分开。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Midstream conversion layer scores 96.1/100 because it contains NVDA, MU, ANET, AMD and has 3 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 中游转化/平台层得分 96.1/100，因为这一层包含 NVDA、MU、ANET、AMD，且有 3 个核心瓶颈候选。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Upstream scarce inputs scores 64.4/100 because it contains TSM, ASML, INTC and has 2 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 上游稀缺输入层得分 64.4/100，因为这一层包含 TSM、ASML、INTC，且有 2 个核心瓶颈候选。

layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_en: Downstream demand layer scores 55.2/100 because it contains AMZN, GOOGL, DLR and has 0 core bottleneck candidate(s).
layer_priorities.scarce_layer_reason_zh: 下游需求层得分 55.2/100，因为这一层包含 AMZN、GOOGL、DLR，且有 0 个核心瓶颈候选。

candidate_reviews.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
candidate_reviews.chain_position: Foundry — advanced-node wafer starts → AI Chips
candidate_reviews.reason_en: TSM sits in Upstream scarce inputs with scarcity score 83.1/100. Bitget execution evidence exists via TSM.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: TSM 位于上游稀缺输入层，稀缺层得分 83.1/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：TSM。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if customers can qualify credible substitutes faster than expected or if capacity expansion removes scarcity.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果客户能更快认证替代方案，或新增产能消除稀缺性，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 从最新 10-K 的风险因素、分部结构与上下游披露开始核查。

primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 检索近期 8-K 中的产能扩张、重大合同或供应扰动。

candidate_reviews.name: Arista Networks
candidate_reviews.chain_position: Networking fabric — AI cluster switching → AI Chips
candidate_reviews.reason_en: ANET sits in Midstream conversion layer with scarcity score 76.3/100. Bitget execution evidence exists via ANET.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: ANET 位于中游转化/平台层，稀缺层得分 76.3/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：ANET。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if customers can qualify credible substitutes faster than expected or if capacity expansion removes scarcity.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果客户能更快认证替代方案，或新增产能消除稀缺性，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Start with the latest 10-K risk factors, segment mix, and customer/supplier disclosures.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 从最新 10-K 的风险因素、分部结构与上下游披露开始核查。

primary_evidence.label_zh: ANET 产能/订单核查清单
primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Scan recent 8-K items for capacity expansions, major contracts, or supply disruptions.
primary_evidence.check_hint_zh: 检索近期 8-K 中的产能扩张、重大合同或供应扰动。

candidate_reviews.name: Digital Realty
candidate_reviews.chain_position: Data center REIT — colocation footprint → AI Chips
candidate_reviews.reason_en: DLR sits in Downstream demand layer with scarcity score 63.9/100. Bitget execution evidence exists via DLR.
candidate_reviews.reason_zh: DLR 位于下游需求层，稀缺层得分 63.9/100。 已有 Bitget 执行证据：DLR。
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_en: Downgrade if the company remains a beneficiary but does not control the scarce layer.
candidate_reviews.failure_condition_zh: 如果公司只是受益者，但并不控制稀缺层，应下调判断。

primary_evidence.check_hint_en: Start with the latest 10-K risk factors, segment mix, and customer/supplier disclosures.

next_checks.text_en: Verify midstream conversion layer with the latest SEC filings, capacity disclosures, lead times, and customer qualification evidence.
next_checks.text_zh: 用最新 SEC 公告、产能披露、交期和客户认证证据验证中游转化/平台层。

next_checks.text_en: Check whether NVDA and peers actually control scarcity in AI Chips, or only benefit from narrative exposure.
next_checks.text_zh: 确认 NVDA 及同类公司是在 AI Chips 中真正控制稀缺性，还是仅受益于叙事暴露。

next_checks.text_en: Compare Bitget-listed proxies against stronger research-only names before presenting a simulated trade basket.
next_checks.text_zh: 在展示模拟交易篮子前，把 Bitget 已上线代理标的与更强但未上线的研究标的分开比较。

next_checks_en: Verify midstream conversion layer with the latest SEC filings, capacity disclosures, lead times, and customer qualification evidence.
Check whether NVDA and peers actually control scarcity in AI Chips, or only benefit from narrative exposure.
Compare Bitget-listed proxies against stronger research-only names before presenting a simulated trade basket.
next_checks_zh: 用最新 SEC 公告、产能披露、交期和客户认证证据验证中游转化/平台层。
确认 NVDA 及同类公司是在 AI Chips 中真正控制稀缺性，还是仅受益于叙事暴露。
在展示模拟交易篮子前，把 Bitget 已上线代理标的与更强但未上线的研究标的分开比较。
limitations_en: The thesis audit is research support, not trade execution.
It does not override Bitget listing status or verified candle availability.
Primary-source links (SEC, IR, regulators) are entry points for manual verification — the app does not scrape or auto-parse filings yet.
Methodology scoring still requires human review of capacity, orders, and customer proof inside linked documents.
limitations_zh: 论证复核只提供研究支持，不执行交易。
它不会覆盖 Bitget 上线状态或已验证 K 线数据。
一手证据链接（SEC、IR、监管机构）是人工核查入口——系统尚未自动抓取或解析公告。
方法论评分仍需要人工阅读链接文件中的产能、订单与客户验证信息。

gics_alignment.detail_en: Query GICS path (Information Technology → Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment → Semiconductors → Semiconductors) aligns with primary bottleneck NVDA (Information Technology → Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment → Semiconductors → Semiconductors) at industry group level.
gics_alignment.detail_zh: 查询 GICS 路径（Information Technology → Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment → Semiconductors → Semiconductors）与主瓶颈 NVDA（Information Technology → Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment → Semiconductors → Semiconductors）在行业组层面一致。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Layers, bottleneck, alternatives, and audit trail without LLM ticker selection.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 层级、瓶颈、替代假设与审计链——不由 LLM 选 ticker。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Prefix 45301020, 15 catalog peers, 1 report(s). Runs parallel to Agent Hub MCP.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 前缀 45301020，15 个目录同业，1 份报告。与 Agent Hub MCP 并行运行。

agent_workflow.detail_en: Symbols attached; backtest pending or unavailable.
agent_workflow.detail_zh: 已挂载 symbols；回测待定或不可用。

agent_workflow.agent_zh: 模拟决策 + 证据导出

achieved_en: Supply-chain bottleneck thesis with alternative hypothesis and thesis audit.
Universe coverage banner shows full/partial/out-of-scope honestly.
Primary-source SEC/IR links in thesis audit.
GICS industry alignment check + Bitget peer discovery via GICS prefix.
achieved_zh: 供应链瓶颈 thesis，含替代假设与论证复核。
覆盖度横幅诚实展示 full/partial/out-of-scope。
论证复核含 SEC/IR 一手证据入口。
GICS 行业对齐校验 + 按 GICS 前缀发现 Bitget 同业。
gaps_en: Fixed curated research universe (~253 companies); niche queries may be proxy-only.
LLM runs in rules/curated grounding mode without live web search.
No automated filing parse — human review still required.
gaps_zh: 固定策展研究库（约 253 家）；冷门行业可能仅为代理映射。
无 API Key 时为规则/精选 grounding 模式。
尚未自动解析公告——仍需人工阅读。

achieved_en: Public demo: https://throatscan-oracle.vercel.app
Bitget public API + backtest + downloadable evidence with SHA-256.
Local paper basket execution at live Bitget prices.
One-click AI chips demo and /api/health verification.
achieved_zh: 公网 Demo：https://throatscan-oracle.vercel.app
Bitget 公开 API + 回测 + 可下载 SHA-256 证据包。
本地纸交易篮子（Bitget 公开价成交）。
一键 AI chips 与 /api/health 验证。
gaps_en: Demo video URL not yet attached in submission pack.
Live trading intentionally locked; Bitget Demo API optional (server env).
gaps_zh: 提交包中尚未附 demo 视频链接。
实盘交易刻意锁定；Bitget Demo API 为可选（服务端 env）。
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_en: Backtest + local paper (Tier 2); not live trading
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_zh: 回测 + 本地纸交易（Tier 2）；非实盘

achieved_en: End-to-end: input → reasoning → research → Bitget → events → sim → backtest → export.
Low-confidence paths withhold Top 5; missing data not fabricated.
Tradability guide separates research-only vs executable names.
achieved_zh: 端到端：输入 → 推理 → 调研 → Bitget → 事件 → 模拟 → 回测 → 导出。
低置信度不强制 Top 5；缺失数据不伪造。
可交易性指南区分研究结论与可执行标的。
gaps_en: Submission form, dev diary, and demo video still manual deliverables.
Current run has research-only names without direct Bitget basket.
gaps_zh: 提交表单、开发日记、demo 视频仍为人工交付项。
本次运行仅有研究结论，无直接 Bitget 篮子。
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_en: MVP complete with honest boundary disclosure
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_zh: MVP 完整，边界披露诚实

achieved_en: ThroatScan is not a single LLM prompt or theme screener. It orchestrates parallel Agent Hub news/macro research, constrained supply-chain reasoning, Bitget tradability verification, and risk-managed simulation — with hard gates the LLM cannot bypass.
In-app Agent Workflow timeline (8 steps) with MCP tools_used and fetch timestamps.
Hard constraints enforced: ticker_allowlist, llm_no_pick, bitget_gate, confidence_cap.
Growth roadmap Phase 1 live; Phase 2 planned.
Rebalance agent plan ready — 0 rebalance events in backtest.
0 Bitget online stock tokens discoverable beyond 253-company research library.
Public repo: https://github.com/vvlnx/agent-hub
achieved_zh: ThroatScan 不是单次 LLM 问答或主题筛选器。它并行编排 Agent Hub 新闻/宏观调研、约束式供应链推理、Bitget 可交易性验证与风控模拟——LLM 无法绕过硬约束门槛。
应用内 Agent 工作流时间线（8 步），含 MCP tools_used 与抓取时间。
硬约束已执行：ticker_allowlist、llm_no_pick、bitget_gate、confidence_cap。
成长路线 Phase 1 已上线；Phase 2 规划中。
再平衡 Agent 计划就绪——回测中 0 次再平衡事件。
0 个 Bitget 在线 stock token 可发现，超越 253 家公司研究库。
公开仓库：https://github.com/vvlnx/agent-hub
gaps_en: Autonomous live trading intentionally disabled for hackathon safety.
Phase 3 earnings-season event agent remains on roadmap (scheduled Q3 extension).
gaps_zh: 自主实盘交易因黑客松安全考虑刻意未启用。
Phase 3 财报季事件 Agent 仍在路线图中（计划 Q3 扩展）。
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_en: Agent-native research-to-execution — not a single LLM prompt
submission_rubric_self_assessment.rating_zh: Agent 原生 research-to-execution — 非单次 LLM 问答

simulated_decision.rationale_en: Select NVDA for Tier A API paper/demo execution using structural bottleneck scores plus capped event and macro overlays.
simulated_decision.rationale_zh: 基于结构性瓶颈评分与受限事件/宏观叠加，选择 NVDA 进入 Tier A API 纸交易/demo 执行。

export_note.en: Live Bitget API was unavailable during this export; backtest and Tier A basket use the last verified NVDA run. GICS/workflow/discovery fields are from the live analysis pass.
export_note.zh: 导出时 Bitget API 不可用；回测与 Tier A 篮子使用最近一次已验证的 NVDA 运行。GICS/工作流/发现字段来自本次 live 分析。

disclosure: Sample evidence export for judges. Full run exports include candles, trades, and research raw data.
